stories.title: Djokovic Equals Federer's All-Time Wimbledon Win Record at 105

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text: Novak Djokovic records win No. 105 at Wimbledon — equaling Roger Federer's all-time men's record. Only Martina Navratilova (120) has more wins at the All England Club. One more win Sunday and Djokovic stands alone. 🎾👑 #Wimbledon #Djokovic #Tennis #TennisFanrecap

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text: Djokovic def. Rinderknech 7-5, 6-4, 1-6, 7-6(4). Record-equaling win No. 105 at Wimbledon. He faces Safiullin (No. 132 WC) in the Round of 16 Sunday — leads H2H 3-0. 🎾 #Wimbledon #Djokovic #Tennis #TennisFanrecap

article.headline: Djokovic Equals Federer's All-Time Wimbledon Win Record at 105

stories.title: Struff Stuns No. 8 Medvedev in Three-Set Masterclass

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text: UPSET: Struff (No. 74) def. No. 8 Medvedev 7-6(4), 7-6(5), 7-5. Medvedev led by a break in all three sets — including 5-2 in the third. Struff won every tiebreak. First Wimbledon R4 of his career. 🎾 #Wimbledon #Tennis #TennisFanrecap #Upset

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text: Medvedev: "I should do better. I am really disappointed." The No. 8 seed converted just 4 of 12 break chances vs Struff — who led in every set — and is out of Wimbledon 2026. #Wimbledon #Medvedev #Tennis #TennisFanrecap

article.headline: Struff Stuns No. 8 Medvedev in Three-Set Wimbledon Masterclass

stories.title: Women's Day 5 Sweep — Sabalenka, Osaka and Gauff All Advance

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text: Women's Day 5 Wimbledon: Sabalenka def. Ostapenko 6-4, 6-4 ✅ Osaka def. Kasatkina 6-1, 6-3 (first-ever Wimbledon R4) ✅ Gauff def. Liu 6-3, 6-7, 6-2 ✅ Sabalenka vs Osaka Sunday is the R4 marquee match. #Wimbledon #WTA #Tennis #TennisFanrecap

stories.title: Day 6 Spotlight — Swiatek vs. Eala Headline Saturday's Action

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text: Today at Wimbledon: Swiatek vs Eala on Centre Court — first-ever grass-court meeting, H2H tied 1-1. An Eala win puts the first Filipino in the Wimbledon R4. Plus Rybakina, Zverev and Keys all in action. #Wimbledon #Tennis #WTA #TennisFanrecap

stories.title: Day 7 Preview — Round of 16 Begins with Djokovic, Sinner, Sabalenka

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text: Round of 16 Sunday at Wimbledon: Djokovic vs Safiullin (chasing win No. 106 — sole record). Defending champion Sinner vs Mochizuki. Sabalenka vs Osaka women's marquee. Alcaraz absent with wrist injury. 🎾 #Wimbledon #Tennis #TennisFanrecap #R4
